content_blocks.text:
624 
chapter 18
Yeah, but who really uses RMI?
1 use it 
for serious 8-to-8, 
e-commerce back-
ends, running on J2EE 
technology.
We use it 
for our cool 
new decision-support 
system.
1 heard your ex-
wife still uses 
plain sockets.
We’ve got an 
EJB-based hotel 
reservation system. 
And EJB uses RMI!
1 just can’t imagine 
life without our Jini-
enabled home network 
and applicances.
Me too! How 
did anyone get 
by? 1 just love RMI 
for giving us Jini 
technology.
uses for RMI
